chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-670 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 02-09-2025 Petitioner is called absent. **** Petitioner, who maintains this petition in person, is called absent; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which reflects that either the petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing this matter or the purpose for which the instant petition was filed has already been achieved. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
